title: SpectralIOGovernor
description: Runtime configuration for the DVSM-v3 Spectral I/O Governor

divergence_threshold.description: dH/dt > this (bits/frame) → trigger prefetch. Tune per title.

diffuse_var_threshold.description: |Z_k| variance above this → Diffuse class → lower mip

collapse_threshold.description: mean |Z_k| below this → Collapsed → minimum mip

default_ttl_frames.description: Prefetch jobs expire after this many frames. ~67ms at 240Hz.

bucket_count.description: Entropy quantization buckets. Higher = more fidelity at O(B²) cost.

salience_threshold.description: P(next bucket) > this → enqueue prefetch for mapped asset group.

format_hint.description: Default compression format for prefetch decompression hint.

mip_savings_estimate.description: Estimated bandwidth reduction from Diffuse mip bias. Title-dependent.

claims_policy.description: No bandwidth or FPS claims without FrameVarianceRing.p99() evidence.
